name: mgtoolbox-kernel
documentation: # MGToolBox Materials Genome Toolbox

functions.name: mgtoolbox_kernel.crystal_tools.crystal_symmetry.get_symm_ops
documentation:
获取结构的对称性操作。
通过使用spglib库来获取给定结构的空间群操作,包括旋转和平移操作。

参数:
struct:Structure - 一个Structure对象,包含了晶体结构信息。

返回:
rot - 旋转操作的数组。
trans - 平移操作的数组。

methods.name: mgtoolbox_kernel.kernel.structure.Structure.get_mic_dis
documentation:
Considering the periodicity of crystals to obtain the distance
between two points within the crystal.
\:param fracoord1: fractional coordinates of site frac_site1,such as[0.5, 0.5, 0.5]
\:param fracoord2: fractional coordinates of site frac_site2
\:return: the shortest distance between two sites

modules.name: mgtoolbox_kernel.util.base
documentation: -*- encoding: utf-8 -*-

functions.name: mgtoolbox_kernel.util.base.parse_sitesym
documentation:
Parses a sequence of site symmetries in the form used by
International Tables and returns corresponding rotation and
translation arrays.

Example:

```pycon
>>> symlist = [
...     'x,y,z',
...     '-y+1/2,x+1/2,z',
...     '-y,-x,-z',
... ]
>>> rot, trans = parse_sitesym(symlist)
>>> rot
array([[[ 1,  0,  0],
        [ 0,  1,  0],
        [ 0,  0,  1]],
<BLANKLINE>
    [[ 0, -1,  0],
        [ 1,  0,  0],
        [ 0,  0,  1]],
<BLANKLINE>
    [[ 0, -1,  0],
        [-1,  0,  0],
        [ 0,  0, -1]]])
>>> trans
array([[ 0. ,  0. ,  0. ],
    [ 0.5,  0.5,  0. ],
    [ 0. ,  0. ,  0. ]])
```

functions.name: mgtoolbox_kernel.util.base.get_lattice_vectors

Get the cell vectors matrix(fix a-axis) from the cell parameters
Parameters

a : float
    晶格参数:a

beta : float

gamma : float

documentation:
Get the minimum distance of to list of cartesian coordinates

Parameters
----------
list | numpy.ndarray
    cartesian coordinates
list | numpy.ndarray, optional
    cartesian coordinates, by default None

-------
numpy.ndarray, numpy.ndarray

methods.name: mgtoolbox_kernel.kernel.cell.Cell.__direct_find_mic
documentation:
Calculate the minimum image distances,and use the result when the minimum image convention is satisfied.The minimum image convention i.e distance < min(a,b,c)/2

Parameters
----------
numpy.ndarray
    distance vector

Returns
-------
numpy.ndarray, numpy.ndarray
    minimum image distance vector and its distance

methods.name: mgtoolbox_kernel.kernel.cell.Cell.__reduce_find_mic
documentation:

Parameters
----------
vecters : numpy.ndarray
    distance vectors

Returns
-------
numpy.ndarray, numpy.ndarray
    minimum image distance vectors and its distances
